title: TalkOrigins Archive: Modernized Preview
description: A SciSiteForge proof-of-concept for the www2.talkorigins.org modernization line.

hero.title: A cleaner, more readable TalkOrigins Archive that still feels like the Archive.
hero.lede: Modernization is already underway: stable Archive articles, dynamic sister-site commentary, corpus-aware search, and claim-centered notebooks can coexist without collapsing into a single CMS.

feature_cards.title: Stable Archive, Modern Access
feature_cards.body: The preview keeps the Archive's durable explanatory role while making the reading surface responsive, easier to scan, and easier to route through search.

feature_cards.title: Foundation Search
feature_cards.body: Search can select among TalkOrigins, TalkDesign, Panda's Thumb, Panda's Thumb MT, and the Index to Creationist Claims as separate corpora.

feature_cards.title: Support Update
feature_cards.body: The public update explains that modernization is already underway and that the stable Archive/dynamic commentary split is intentional.

section_cards.title: Featured FAQ: Misconceptions
section_cards.body: A representative long-form Archive article demonstrates how legacy explanatory material can be presented in the modern theme.

section_cards.title: Featured Claim: CA100
section_cards.body: A representative Index to Creationist Claims entry shows the claim-centered path into evidence and rebuttal material.

bibliography_entries.title: TalkOrigins Archive
bibliography_entries.body: Stable explanatory articles and FAQs for recurring creation/evolution controversy topics.

bibliography_entries.title: Index to Creationist Claims
bibliography_entries.body: Claim-indexed rebuttal and reference material used as a cross-site search and notebook anchor.

bibliography_entries.title: Panda's Thumb MT Archive
bibliography_entries.body: Definitive corpus for the Movable Type-era Panda's Thumb archive, distinct from the broader scraped corpus.

notebooks.title: Evidence and Claims Notebook
notebooks.summary: A reusable study module that can connect stable Archive articles, Index to Creationist Claims entries, guided concepts, and bibliography updates.
notebooks.audience: self-learners, instructors, and board-reviewed site editors
goals: Move from a claim to the relevant evidence and archive context
Keep stable source material separate from dynamic commentary
Expose provenance, citations, and review status as first-class study material

apps.title: Public search
apps.description: Search across Foundation corpora and the Index to Creationist Claims
